summary: Completed comprehensive testing of TrustOffice new features: 3 new minutes templates (Designation of Beneficiaries, Bank Account Authorization, Change of Situs) and Dashboard Quick Actions panel. All 6 backend API tests passed (100%). All 15 frontend UI tests passed (100%).

issues: Console warning about <tr> inside <span> element - minor HTML nesting issue (inherited from previous iteration, doesn't affect functionality)

backend_api: POST /api/minutes-templates designation_of_beneficiaries generates correct document with WHEREAS/RESOLVED
POST /api/minutes-templates bank_account_authorization generates correct document with bank details
POST /api/minutes-templates change_of_situs generates correct document with jurisdiction change
Bank account template with threshold signature requirement works
Designation of beneficiaries with amendment type works
frontend_ui: Dashboard shows Quick Actions panel with 6 buttons
Quick Actions shows: Record Distribution, Add Asset to Trust, Open Bank Account, Appoint Trustee, View Schedule A, General Meeting
Minutes Templates page shows all 9 templates
Designation form has: Designation Type, Total Units, Beneficiaries section, Add Beneficiary button
Bank Account form has: Bank/Institution Name, Account Type, Purpose, Authorized Signers, Signature Requirement
Change of Situs form has: Current Situs, New Situs, Effective Date, Reasons for Change
Quick Action 'Open Bank Account' → bank_account_authorization template

seed_data_creation: Used demo data auto-seeding via 'Use Demo Data' button
context_for_next_testing_agent: TrustOffice now has 9 minutes templates total (3 new: designation_of_beneficiaries, bank_account_authorization, change_of_situs). Dashboard Quick Actions panel has 6 one-click actions that navigate to correct template forms. All templates generate proper WHEREAS/RESOLVED language. Previous minor HTML nesting warning in ScheduleAPage still exists but doesn't affect functionality.
